items.question: How do I integrate hardware terminals for in-store payments (attached and app switch modes)?

answer.text: To accept in-store payments using hardware terminals (like SurfTouch or SurfPad), you must:
points: Complete the in-store terminal setup and registration.
For **attached mode**: Integrate SurfTouch directly with your POS or ECR system for seamless, direct payment acceptance.
For **app switch mode**: Use the CheckoutX inter-app flow, which allows your POS or app to switch to the payment app for transaction processing, then return to your app after payment.
Refer to the **hardware terminal guides** for step-by-step setup and integration details.

items.question: How do I integrate SoftPOS (software point-of-sale) for in-store payments?

answer.text: For SoftPOS (accepting payments on Android devices without dedicated hardware):
points: Follow the same in-store flow as hardware terminals.
SoftPOS uses CheckoutX as a POS, supporting both attached and app switch modes.
No dedicated hardware is required—just install the app on a compatible Android device.
See the **SoftPOS setup guide** for configuration and integration steps.

items.question: How do I integrate online payments using PaymentPage?

answer.text: To accept payments online with PaymentPage:
points: Register an online terminal in "PaymentPage" mode.
Embed the provided payment link or widget into your website or app.
Customers are redirected to a secure, fully hosted checkout page to complete their payment.
Monitor payment status using the Fetch Order Status API or webhooks.
See the **PaymentPage integration guide** for details.

items.question: How do I integrate online payments using the SDK?

answer.text: For a custom online checkout experience:
points: Register an online terminal in "SelfHostedPage" (SDK) mode.
Use the online payments SDK to build the checkout into your app or website.
The SDK provides APIs for order creation, payment initiation, and status tracking.
Sample code and a React demo app are available for reference.
See the **SDK integration guide** for implementation steps.

notes.title: Note:
items: For all integration types, you must first create a merchant account and set up your store in the Surfboard Developer Portal.
To test each in-store payment initiation, use the Surftester app.
You can manage terminals, stores, and payment methods via the portal or APIs.
For more advanced scenarios (like recurring payments, refunds, or multi-terminal setups), you can also refer to the view full documentation by clicking on learn more in the use cases.
